name: Umbral Reaver
description: Class that heavily relies on damage dealth over time and dodges

skills.name: Poisoned Blade
skills.description: Deal 50% of your damage over 3 seconds, but reduce damage dealt by weapon by 25%.

skills.name: Mirage
skills.description: 3% chance to completely ignore incoming damage

skills.name: Echo of Agony
skills.description: Critical damage deals 100% of target's incoming damage over time and removes it

skills.name: Shadow counter
skills.description: After dodging an attack, your next attack deals double damage
